column1: # Tools/lib modules exempt from the functional-coverage goal, one per line:
# Keep this list under review: scripts/coverage-audit.sh flags entries that
# are stale (path gone) or shadowed (a functional test now covers them).
# Everything here still gets smoke coverage (CLI contract + dep-skip paths).

column2: needs a physical CD drive and audio disc (cdparanoia)
needs a real VIDEO_TS rip; synthetic IFO/VOB mocking is impractical
needs a real BDMV rip and makemkvcon
proprietary takc binary (TAK, via wine); AUDIO_UTILS_TAKC
needs a .tak fixture, which only takc can produce
needs a .ape fixture, which only mac can produce
no shorten encoder exists to produce fixtures
ffmpeg decodes DSF but cannot encode it; no fixture source
queries the MusicBrainz web service; offline mocking would test nothing real
